title: Cryostat Probe Layout: Minimum Star-Discrepancy Wiring
strategies: trivial: pile all probes on the main diagonal ((i+0.5)/M,(i+0.5)/M) -- reproduces the checker baseline B (~0.1)
greedy: a centred sqrt(M) x sqrt(M) regular grid; uniform but O(1/sqrt(M)) discrepancy
strong: 2-D Hammersley set (van-der-Corput radical inverse base 2 vs i/M); O(log M / M) discrepancy, well below the grid but NOT the unknown optimum
open: optimise probe positions directly against the exact star discrepancy; the true minimum-discrepancy layout is unknown for M>~20 even in 2-D
